slides.title: Add weight to your walk. *Change everything*.
slides.sub: Rucking is simply walking with a loaded pack. It builds strength and endurance without the pounding of running.

slides.title: Load turns a walk into training
slides.body: Carrying a weighted pack raises the demand on your whole body. A walk becomes a full *strength and cardio* session.

slides.title: Stronger bones under load
slides.body: Bone responds to mechanical strain by getting denser. Weighted walking *can support* bone health as you age.

slides.title: Heart and legs, together
slides.body: Extra load lifts your heart rate and your endurance at an easy pace. You build *cardiovascular fitness* without sprinting.

slides.title: Easier on your joints
slides.body: Walking keeps both feet grounded, so there is no impact spike. You get the stimulus *without the joint pounding* of running.

slides.title: Begin light, add slowly
slides.body: Start with a comfortable pack and a flat route. Add weight or distance *only when it feels easy*, never both at once.

slides.title: Make every walk *count for more*.
slides.body: Vibe Health logs your steps, movement and recovery, then folds them into one daily Health Score so you can see your rucking pay off.
slides.cta_text: search ‘Vibe Health’ on the App Store

caption:
A walk you already do, made twice as powerful. Just add a loaded pack. 🌿🎒

Rucking builds bone density and endurance through mechanical strain, all while sparing your joints the pounding of running. Save this for your next walk. 🔖

Vibe Health turns those steps into one daily score → link in bio.
youtube_title: Rucking: The Weighted Walk That Builds Strength and Endurance
